data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Revision and rejection handling', but the evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for revision and rejection handling, yet there is no evidence of actual revision or rejection processes being executed or validated. This indicates a clear gap in the validation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of revision and rejection handling.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the revision and rejection handling requirement.
